productDisplayName: Tokyo Talkies Women Printed White Top
description: Composition White T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short puff sleeves and grunge look graphic on the front with silver accents Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash using mild detergent Do not bleach Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery Custom graphics add to the edgy look of this tokyo talkies T-shirt. The grunge look graphic print of the flowers is made more feminine with the addition of silver accents and puff sleeves, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day long. Team it with jeans, carpis or shorts. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'7' and chest 33"
